calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools is Tuesday, August 24, 2027. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools is Wednesday, June 7, 2028. The school year runs from August through June, covering 185 instructional days. Families planning summer activities should note that CMS ends in early June — later than many out-of-state districts that finish in May.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Spring Break for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools in 2027-2028 runs from Monday, April 10 through Friday, April 14, 2028. Classes resume Monday, April 17. This is notably later than the prior year and one of the later Spring Break windows among North Carolina's large districts. In 2027-2028, CMS Spring Break aligns with Guilford County Schools — a rare overlap that families coordinating between Charlotte and the Greensboro area may find useful. Families booking spring travel should note that Charlotte Douglas Airport (CLT) and popular beach destinations will experience peak demand during this window.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Winter Break for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools in 2027-2028 begins Monday, December 20, 2027, and runs through Wednesday, December 31. Classes resume on Thursday, January 2, 2028, as January 1 is New Year's Day. The break spans approximately 12 days. Families booking holiday travel from Charlotte Douglas Airport (CLT) should book flights early — the week before Winter Break and the week after New Year's are among the busiest departure windows at CLT.

calendarFaqs.q: Does CMS take the full Thanksgiving week off in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: No. Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools observes Thanksgiving Break on Thursday, November 25 and Friday, November 26, 2027 only — not the full week. Monday through Wednesday of Thanksgiving week (November 22-24) are regular school days. Families planning Thanksgiving travel should arrange early departure or confirm that absences are approved; CMS does not automatically close for the full week. Families new to CMS from districts that take a full week off for Thanksgiving should adjust their holiday plans accordingly.

calendarFaqs.q: How many school days does CMS have in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools has 185 instructional days in the 2027-2028 school year, organized into two semesters. North Carolina requires a minimum number of instructional hours, and CMS meets this requirement across 185 days. The school year runs from August 24, 2027 to June 7, 2028.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break Shifts Later
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break moves from Mar 29–Apr 2 (2026–2027) to Apr 10–14 — about two weeks later — and aligns with Guilford County Schools for the first time in recent years.

calendarNotes: Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools begins the 2027–2028 school year on August 24, 2027 — the latest start among North Carolina's large districts. In 2027–2028, CMS Spring Break (April 10–14) aligns with Guilford County Schools — a rare shared window between the two districts. The school year ends June 7, 2028.
